calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Oct-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Chris Land, via ZOOM, for Lura Sims, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that there may be notice issues due to the Petitioner seeking the approval of an agreement in the proposed order which was not included in the caption of the original petition. Counsel is given the option of continuing this hearing to amend the petition and provide notice of the amendment or to proceed this morning but with the understanding that the court will not consider the request to approve the agreement shown in the proposed order. Counsel agrees to procced with today's hearing without the court's consideration of the request to approve the agreement. Counsel and the court then briefly discuss the requirement of a bond. The court believes that no bond is required.

The Petition to Appoint Successor Co-Trustees is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

Petition To Appoint Successor Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Continued To Sep-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
